registry_purpose: Honest governance registry distinct from CAPABILITIES_REGISTRY.json (code-only). Each entry documents real invocation type, security posture, audit method. Triggered by AUDIT_DECISION_DOSSIER_2026-05-16 §5.1-5.3 + P0.4 (Issue #45). Three skills labeled 'active' via skills-lock.json are in fact Python local heuristics — this registry corrects that drift.

schema.type: installed_external_active | installed_external_dormant | installed_custom | runtime_heuristic_python | subagent | mcp_server | archived
schema.invocation_proof: string (file:line OR 'no occurrence found via grep')

mathis_decision_summary: 18 externals audited. Proposed: KEEP=13 (impeccable runtime_heuristic + 12 doc-only/session-level superpowers safe), DROP=4 (brainstorming, receiving-code-review, requesting-code-review, gstack), PIN=0 (impeccable NPM source is dormant under KEEP envelope). Final DROP/PIN decisions deferred to Mathis review of SKILLS_SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md.

security_npm_source.details: NPM scripts in .agents/skills/impeccable/scripts/ (61 files) use child_process execSync (live-poll.mjs:11, live.mjs:20), fetch http://localhost:port (live-browser.js + 5 others), process.env.IMPECCABLE_CONTEXT_DIR. Local-only network. NOT invoked by pipeline.

entries.decision_justification: Python local in moteur_gsg/core/impeccable_qa.py is what runs (safe, covered by lint hygiene). NPM source dormant — PIN on SHA recommended, no auto-update.
entries.notes: Skill installed via skills-lock.json (pbakaus/impeccable), but invoked as Python function `run_impeccable_qa(html)` in moteur_gsg/core/impeccable_qa.py:384. Therefore type=runtime_heuristic_python (honest). Security field reflects Python runtime path (safe); security_npm_source reflects the NPM source on disk (heavy but inert).

entries.decision_justification: Markdown source (.agents/skills/cro-methodology/, 1 SKILL.md + 6 references, NO scripts) is safe. Python local in moteur_gsg/core/cro_methodology_audit.py is what runs.
entries.notes: Skill installed via skills-lock.json (wondelai/skills), but invoked as `run_cro_methodology_audit(copy_doc, brief)` Python function in moteur_gsg/core/cro_methodology_audit.py:233. Module docstring explicitly states 'honest runtime version'. Type=runtime_heuristic_python.

entries.decision_justification: Markdown source (.agents/skills/emil-design-eng/, 1 SKILL.md only, NO scripts) is safe. Python local in moteur_gsg/core/emil_design_eng_audit.py is what runs.
entries.notes: Skill installed via skills-lock.json (emilkowalski/skill), invoked as `run_emil_design_eng_audit(html)` Python function in moteur_gsg/core/emil_design_eng_audit.py:130. Type=runtime_heuristic_python.

entries.decision_justification: Local HTTP server (.agents/skills/brainstorming/scripts/server.cjs binds 127.0.0.1:random) + env vars BRAINSTORM_* + /tmp/brainstorm/ fs scope. Replaceable by growthcro-prd-planner + growthcro-anti-drift (covers structured brainstorm). No active session usage detected.
entries.notes: EXCEPTION among superpowers: this one HAS scripts. server.cjs (354 LOC) creates http.createServer on 127.0.0.1, reads BRAINSTORM_PORT/HOST/URL_HOST/DIR/OWNER_PID env. start-server.sh/stop-server.sh boundary shell. Local-only network, no remote download, no secrets, no git.

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md only, no scripts). Used in this Wave 3 session dispatch. Zero attack surface.
entries.notes: Dormant — invoked indirectly via session orchestration (current Wave 2 parallel dispatch). Used at LLM/session layer, not Python code.

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md only). Paired with writing-plans for session-level plan execution discipline.
entries.notes: Dormant. Used at session level when executing written plans. Candidate to KEEP (regular session use).

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only SKILL.md. Teaches LLM session-time git merge/rebase/push discipline (executed by Bash tool, not by skill scripts). Useful end-of-wave.
entries.notes: Dormant. Loads git commands at session-time when finishing a branch. KEEP for end-of-wave merge discipline.

security.details: 768 files. child_process execSync/spawnSync in dev-skill.ts, host-config-export.ts, skill-check.ts, test-free-shards.ts, slop-diff.ts. Deps include @ngrok/ngrok (tunnel), playwright (browser), @huggingface/transformers (ML download). process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY read and PASSED to subprocess (preflight-agent-sdk.ts:56,72). setup-scc.sh downloads binaries from github.com/boyter/scc/releases via Homebrew. slop-diff.ts spawns 'git diff' + 'npx slop-scan'. package.json uses ^ flexible deps.

entries.decision_justification: CRITICAL: combo shell + network + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY manipulation + remote binary download + unpinned deps for a DORMANT skill. AUDIT_DECISION_DOSSIER §5.7 already lists 'Réinstaller gstack sans audit sécurité' as anti-pattern. If re-installation needed later: exact pin all deps + sandbox subprocess + dynamic_test audit required.
entries.notes: Install reported failed in doc 2026-05-14, dormant. Headless browser QA capabilities — security review required before reactivation (network + shell + fs). DROP candidate (Issue #46).

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md only). No active PR review workflow on GrowthCRO (solo dev). If Mathis opens PR review workflow later, re-install. Native /security-review covers code review needs.
entries.notes: Dormant — session-level skill for processing review feedback. Candidate DROP (no active PR workflow).

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md + code-reviewer.md template). No active PR review workflow. Native /security-review covers needs.
entries.notes: Dormant — session-level skill for requesting reviews. Candidate DROP (no active PR workflow).

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md + 3 prompt templates .md). Used in this exact Wave 3 session (subagent dispatch). Zero attack surface.
entries.notes: Dormant. Used implicitly when current orchestrator session spawns subagents (TaskCreate). KEEP.

entries.decision_justification: SKILL.md + 8 references .md + find-polluter.sh (bash bisection script, safe, uses git stash + find). Script is manually invoked, audit clean.
entries.notes: Dormant. Session-level discipline. find-polluter.sh shell bisection script — safe but writes (git stash test files temp).

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only (SKILL.md + testing-anti-patterns.md). TDD is GrowthCRO doctrine — session-level discipline.
entries.notes: Dormant. Session-level. KEEP.

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only SKILL.md. Teaches git worktree add/remove at session level (executed by Bash tool). Useful for Wave parallel dispatch isolation.
entries.notes: Dormant. Git worktree management at session level. KEEP for isolated feature work.

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only SKILL.md + 3 platform-mapping .md references. Session-onboarding router for the other superpowers skills. Required if >=1 superpower is kept.
entries.notes: Dormant. Session-onboarding skill loaded at conversation start by harness. Acts as router to other obra/superpowers skills. KEEP.

entries.decision_justification: Doc-only SKILL.md. Already mirrored in CLAUDE.md §Règles immuables (Code hygiene gate, Schemas guard-rails) — complements project doctrine.
entries.notes: Dormant. Session-level discipline (run tests before claiming done). KEEP — already part of CLAUDE.md rules.

entries.notes: Dormant. Session-level plan-writing helper. KEEP (paired with executing-plans).

entries.decision_justification: SKILL.md + 4 references .md + render-graphs.js (uses execSync 'dot' graphviz binary, writes .svg). Script audited safe (reads markdown, writes SVG only). Used in Wave 1 to create 3 custom skills.
entries.notes: Dormant. render-graphs.js requires system 'graphviz' binary (optional, skip if absent). Used in Wave 1 of stratosphere-p0 to create 3 custom skills (anti-drift, prd-planner, status-memory). KEEP.
